School Profile
app.nmao.us/portal.html?s=
This is the sign-in address members use. Changing it will break previously shared sign-in links.

No Logo

Public Booking Page
Share this on social or in your bio so members can reserve and prospects can book a trial. It uses the same link name as your member portal (set above).

Saved Schemes
Save up to three full color schemes — everyday, seasonal, tournament — then switch the whole platform with one tap.

When a student renews a membership with rollover enabled, unused classes carry forward up to this cap. Leave blank for no cap.

Payment Processing

Connect your Stripe account to accept membership payments and retail sales directly from your students.

Create Event
Step 1 of 3 — Details
Event Type
Basic Info
Public Signup

When enabled, anyone with the link can register. Use this to share via email, social media, or QR code.

Schedule Type

Multi-session events let you track a single set of registrations across multiple dates — ideal for camps and clinics.

Sessions
Pricing Tiers

Add tiers for full event, single day, member rates, early bird, etc. Each tier defines how many sessions are included — students can purchase a partial-attendance pass.

Suggested flyer text
SVG & PNG are best for print; JPEG for messaging & social.
Welcome, Sensei

Your school is ready.

Thank you for joining the National Martial Arts Organization. Your platform is set up and waiting. Let's walk through what's next.

First Steps
  • Add your school logo and brand colors
  • Create your first program and class
  • Add students one at a time or import a CSV
  • Connect Stripe to accept member payments

Use the Getting Started checklist on your dashboard to track your progress. We are here when you need us.

Loading...
Billing

For a plan that bills every few months, keep Type as Monthly and set Length to 3, 6, or 12 with Unit = Months. Length × Unit is how often the card is charged.

Class Allowance
days after purchase — blank = never expires
Show advanced settings
By default, Per Week resets every 7 days, Per Month resets every 30 days, Per Year every 365 days. Set both fields to override with a custom period (biweekly = 2 weeks, quarterly = 3 months, etc). Changes apply at the next cycle reset for current subscribers.
Commitment & Cancellation

How long the member agrees to stay. Billing still follows the cycle above. Leave blank for no commitment.

month(s)
How often the card is charged. 1 = monthly, 3 = quarterly, 6 = every six months, 12 = annually.
